novel_features.name: Sentry organization inventory
novel_features.description: List Sentry organizations available to the authenticated token with structured output.
novel_features.rationale: Uses Sentry’s authenticated organizations endpoint and adds agent-friendly selection and output modes.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this first when an agent needs to discover the organization slug for Sentry API work.

novel_features.name: Seer model inventory
novel_features.description: List the active LLM model names available through Sentry Seer.
novel_features.rationale: Uses Sentry’s Seer model endpoint as a compact capability discovery command.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when an agent needs to know which Seer-backed model identifiers Sentry exposes.

novel_features_built.description: List Sentry organizations available to the authenticated token with structured output.
novel_features_built.rationale: Uses Sentry’s authenticated organizations endpoint and adds agent-friendly selection and output modes.
novel_features_built.why_it_matters: Use this first when an agent needs to discover the organization slug for Sentry API work.

novel_features_built.name: Seer model inventory
novel_features_built.description: List the active LLM model names available through Sentry Seer.
novel_features_built.rationale: Uses Sentry’s Seer model endpoint as a compact capability discovery command.
novel_features_built.why_it_matters: Use this when an agent needs to know which Seer-backed model identifiers Sentry exposes.

narrative.headline: A broad Sentry API CLI with local search, SQL, export, and MCP surfaces for incident work.
narrative.value_prop: Use Sentry from scripts and agents without memorizing endpoint shapes. The CLI wraps the catalog OpenAPI, supports structured output, and adds local sync/search/SQL paths for incident triage and release audits.
narrative.auth_narrative: Set SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN to a Sentry user or organization token with read scopes such as org:read, project:read, and event:read. Set SENTRY_REGION=de for EU-region SaaS organizations, or configure the base URL for self-hosted Sentry if supported by the generated config.

quickstart.comment: Confirm token and API reachability before running endpoint commands.
Find the organization slug used by most Sentry API calls.

quickstart.command: sentry-pp-cli organizations projects list-an-organization-s my-org --json --select slug,name
quickstart.comment: List projects once you know the organization slug.

quickstart.command: sentry-pp-cli organizations issues list-an-organization-s my-org --json --select shortId,title,count,userCount
quickstart.comment: Start incident triage with organization issues.
Search synced local data when you need offline or repeated context.

troubleshoots.fix: Export SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN with a valid Sentry token and rerun `sentry-pp-cli doctor --json`.
Set SENTRY_REGION=de or the generated base-url flag/env var before retrying.

troubleshoots.symptom: Issue or project commands need a slug
troubleshoots.fix: Run `sentry-pp-cli organizations list --json --select slug,name` and then project list commands to discover fixture slugs.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when an agent or script needs structured access to Sentry organizations, projects, issues, events, releases, monitors, teams, and related observability data. Prefer it over a hosted MCP when you need local binaries, local sync/search/SQL, CSV/JSON output, or direct control over auth and region routing.

recipes.title: Discover orgs
recipes.explanation: Find organization slugs for scoped Sentry commands.

recipes.title: List projects for an org
recipes.command: sentry-pp-cli organizations projects list-an-organization-s my-org --json --select slug,name
recipes.explanation: Find project slugs before project-scoped incident queries.

recipes.title: List issues narrowly
recipes.command: sentry-pp-cli organizations issues list-an-organization-s my-org --agent --select shortId,title,count,userCount
recipes.explanation: Keep agent context focused while triaging current issues.

recipes.title: Export organization inventory
recipes.explanation: Create a portable incident handoff file after syncing or listing data.

recipes.title: Inspect CLI capabilities
recipes.explanation: Give an agent the live command and auth surface before choosing a Sentry operation.
